title: Two-factor authentication (TOTP)
descriptionEnabled: Two-factor authentication is active on your account. You have {{count}} unused backup code(s).
descriptionDisabled: Two-factor authentication adds an extra verification step at sign-in using a code from an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, 1Password).

enrollDialog.title: Enable two-factor authentication
enrollDialog.step1: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (or paste the secret manually).
enrollDialog.step2: Then enter the 6-digit code your app is currently showing:

disableDialog.title: Disable two-factor authentication
disableDialog.description: Enter your current 6-digit code to confirm disabling.

regenDialog.title: Regenerate backup codes
regenDialog.description: Enter your current 6-digit code to generate a new set. Previous backup codes will stop working.

backupCodesDialog.title: Your backup codes
backupCodesDialog.warning: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used only once and they will not be shown again.

errors.invalidCode: Invalid code. Double-check the digits and try again.
errors.lockedOut: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

siteSettings.title: Two-factor authentication — {{siteKey}}
siteSettings.description: Choose whether two-factor authentication (TOTP) is active on this site and whether all users must enrol.
siteSettings.noSite: No site context available. Open this page from a site's administration panel.

enabled.label: Enable TOTP MFA on this site
enabled.help: When off, users of this site sign in without a second factor. When on, enrolled users are prompted for an authenticator code at login.

enforced.label: Enforce enrollment
enforced.help: When on, users who have not yet enrolled in TOTP are redirected to the enrollment page at login (subject to the grace period) and cannot complete sign-in until they enrol.

graceDays.label: Grace period (days)
graceDays.help: When enforcing, the number of days a newly-prompted user may still sign in before enrollment becomes mandatory. 0 = immediate.

groups.label: Restrict to groups (optional)
groups.help: Comma-separated group names. If set, the policy applies only to members of these groups (e.g. editors). Leave empty to apply to all users of the site.

reset.title: Reset a user's MFA
reset.help: Clear a user's TOTP enrollment when they have lost both their device and their backup codes. The user will be able to enrol again at next login.
reset.done: The user's TOTP enrollment has been reset.

audit.title: Audit & reporting
audit.reportSummary: {{enrolled}} of {{total}} users are enrolled in TOTP.

errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to change these settings.
errors.notAuthenticated: Please sign in again to change these settings.
errors.generic: Could not save the settings. Please try again.
